summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FlowIQ Smart Insights upgrade. All advanced insights features are working correctly including 7 insight types, spending personality classification, and financial health scoring system.
passed_tests: Backend API: All 9 endpoints working (100% success rate)
GET /api/insights-advanced returns complete data structure with insights, personality, and health_score
Advanced insights generation: 5 insight types including spending_trend, category_dominance, subscriptions, cashflow_warning, savings_projection
Spending personality classification: lifestyle_spender type with 3 traits and 5 recommendations
Financial health score: 45/100 with grade D and 4 factors breakdown
Insights page loads with 'Smart Insights' title and proper layout
Spending Personality Card displays with gradient background, emoji, traits, and recommendations
Financial Health Score Card shows circular score, grade, progress bars for 4 factors, and improvement tips
5 Advanced Insight Cards with proper badges, headlines, descriptions, and data points
Mobile responsive design working on 390x844 viewport
Navigation between Dashboard, Insights, and Upload pages working
Integration with dashboard 'View all' link working
Error handling and navigation recovery working
